detailedDescription.architecture: Behavioral Event Stream: Tracks all customer interactions via JavaScript SDK: page views (product, category, brand), product interactions (view, hover, add-to-cart, add-to-wishlist, remove), search queries and result interactions, purchase history, return history, review behavior. Real-time event streaming via Kafka → ClickHouse for millisecond-latency feature computation. Sequential Recommendation Model: BERT4Rec architecture (transformer-based sequential recommendation). Each customer's behavior sequence is tokenized as a series of item interactions. Pre-trained on aggregate behavior, then fine-tuned per customer segment. Handles cold start: new customers get segment-based recommendations, transitioning to personalized as interactions accumulate. Session-aware recommendations: real-time session context influences recommendations (if browsing running shoes, shoe accessories surface). Personalization Applications: Homepage recommendations: top-N items predicted to interest each specific user. Complementary product recommendations: "goes well with" based on co-purchase patterns + semantic product similarity. Search result reranking: same query returns different ordering per customer based on their preference model. Email personalization: weekly personalized product email with highest predicted CTR items per customer. Abandoned cart recovery: personalized recovery email with alternatives if the specific abandoned item is out of stock. Price sensitivity detection: identifies price-sensitive segments for targeted promotions without discounting to price-insensitive customers.

title: BuilderIQ
fullTitle:
BuilderIQ: AI-Powered Building Energy Audit and Retrofit
            Optimization Platform
description:
An AI platform that analyzes building energy data,
            utility bills, weather, and architectural plans to automatically generate comprehensive energy audits,
            identify the top-10 highest-ROI retrofit opportunities (insulation, HVAC upgrade, lighting, solar, heat
            pumps), model post-retrofit energy performance, and generate investment-grade retrofit business
            cases—replacing $5,000-$20,000 manual energy audits with a $200 automated analysis.

detailedDescription.problem: Buildings are responsible for 40% of global CO2 emissions; 80% of today's buildings will still be in use in 2050. Energy retrofits reduce consumption by 20-40% but only 1-2% of buildings are retrofitted annually due to: high audit cost ($5,000-$20,000), complex ROI calculation, contractor selection difficulty, and financing uncertainty. The global building retrofit market opportunity is $300B/year but is severely under-penetrated.
detailedDescription.solution: An AI platform that analyzes building energy data, utility bills, weather, and architectural plans to automatically generate comprehensive energy audits, identify the top-10 highest-ROI retrofit opportunities (insulation, HVAC upgrade, lighting, solar, heat pumps), model post-retrofit energy performance, and generate investment-grade retrofit business cases—replacing $5,000-$20,000 manual energy audits with a $200 automated analysis.
detailedDescription.architecture: Building Energy Modeling: Data inputs: 24 months of utility bills (electricity, gas, water), building characteristics (year built, type, size, location from address geocoding), thermostat data via Ecobee/Nest API, occupancy schedule. ASHRAE 90.1 compliant energy model construction using EnergyPlus via OpenStudio API: calibrated against actual utility bills. Baseline energy use intensity (EUI) benchmarked against CBECS (Commercial Buildings Energy Consumption Survey) for building type/age/climate zone. Gap = benchmarking-identified savings opportunity in kWh/year and dollars. Retrofit Opportunity Analysis: Parametric analysis: run EnergyPlus simulations for 50+ retrofit measures (insulation upgrades by R-value, window replacement by U-factor, HVAC replacement by efficiency tier, LED lighting, solar PV sizing, heat pump sizing, smart controls). For each measure: energy savings (kWh/year, therms/year), demand reduction (kW), carbon reduction (tCO2e/year). Financial Modeling: Project cost estimation: RSMeans construction cost database by region, equipment pricing APIs. Simple payback, NPV at configurable discount rate, IRR, with and without available incentives. Incentive database: IRA tax credits (45L, 179D), utility rebate programs per utility (DSIRE database), state incentives. Cash flow projection with financing (PACE, green bonds, utility on-bill). Report Generation: Investment-grade PDF energy audit report with: executive summary, current performance, top-10 ranked retrofit measures with individual ROI, recommended implementation sequence, available incentives per measure, contractor scope of work templates.

title: ScamShield
fullTitle:
ScamShield: Real-Time E-Commerce Seller Fraud and Counterfeit
            Product Detection
description:
An AI platform for e-commerce marketplaces and
            brands that detects counterfeit listings, fraudulent sellers, and fake reviews using computer vision
            (product image analysis), NLP (listing language patterns), behavioral analytics (seller account behavior),
            and network analysis (seller relationship graphs)—protecting brand equity and consumer trust while reducing
            marketplace fraud liability.

detailedDescription.problem: E-commerce counterfeit goods cost legitimate brands $323B annually in lost revenue. Amazon faces $1B+ in annual losses from fraudulent seller returns and counterfeit listings. 42% of online reviews are fake (BrightLocal). Brands lose 20-30% of value when consumers encounter counterfeits of their products on marketplaces. Marketplace liability exposure from counterfeit sales is now $5-50M per incident under SHOP SAFE Act.
detailedDescription.solution: An AI platform for e-commerce marketplaces and brands that detects counterfeit listings, fraudulent sellers, and fake reviews using computer vision (product image analysis), NLP (listing language patterns), behavioral analytics (seller account behavior), and network analysis (seller relationship graphs)—protecting brand equity and consumer trust while reducing marketplace fraud liability.
detailedDescription.architecture: Multi-Signal Counterfeit Detection: Computer Vision: product image comparison against brand's authentic product image database using CLIP image embeddings + SimCLR contrastive learning. Detects: incorrect logo proportions, wrong color profiles, packaging text errors, missing security features. Quality defect detection: authentic products have characteristic manufacturing signatures (stitch density, material texture) that counterfeits approximate but don't match. NLP Listing Analysis: listing language pattern classifier trained on confirmed authentic vs. counterfeit listings. Counterfeit indicators: suspiciously low price mentions, copied authentic description with small modifications, characteristic keyword patterns ("100% original" over-assertion), poor grammar patterns by language. Seller Behavioral Analytics: new seller account with immediately high volume (stolen identity fraud), unrealistic positive review velocity, geographic implausibility (seller claims US but shipping from China with 20-day delivery), return rate anomalies. Fake Review Detection: Review graph analysis: coordinated review patterns (many reviewers sharing IP, device fingerprints, account creation dates). NLP review quality scoring: generic positive language patterns (no specific product mention), short review + 5-star pattern. Review velocity spike detection: sudden burst inconsistent with sales history. Graph Network Analysis: seller relationship graph: shared bank accounts, phone numbers, address clusters—identify family of fraudulent seller accounts coordinating across different names. Brand Protection API: brands submit product specifications and image library; platform continuously monitors for violations and generates DMCA-ready takedown requests.

title: AssetTracer
fullTitle:
AssetTracer: Physical Asset Lifecycle Intelligence and
            Depreciation Optimization
description:
An enterprise asset management AI platform that
            tracks physical assets (equipment, vehicles, IT hardware, real estate fixtures) from acquisition through
            disposal, predicts optimal replacement timing using condition data and TCO modeling, generates
            GAAP-compliant depreciation schedules, and identifies lease-vs-buy optimization opportunities—reducing
            asset-related OpEx by 15-25%.

detailedDescription.problem: Large enterprises manage $500B-$5T in physical assets with surprisingly poor visibility. Asset managers rely on spreadsheets that are 20-40% inaccurate due to data entry errors, unreported disposals, and missing maintenance records. Sub-optimal asset replacement timing (holding aging equipment too long or replacing prematurely) costs companies 10-20% of their asset base annually. GAAP depreciation errors create material financial restatement risk.
detailedDescription.solution: An enterprise asset management AI platform that tracks physical assets (equipment, vehicles, IT hardware, real estate fixtures) from acquisition through disposal, predicts optimal replacement timing using condition data and TCO modeling, generates GAAP-compliant depreciation schedules, and identifies lease-vs-buy optimization opportunities—reducing asset-related OpEx by 15-25%.
detailedDescription.architecture: Asset Registry: QR/RFID tag integration for physical asset identification. Mobile asset tagging app for field asset registration. IoT sensor integration for condition monitoring (vibration, hours of use). OCR-based invoice parsing for automatic asset addition from purchase invoices (using LayoutLMv3). Manufacturer API integration for asset specification database. Condition Assessment Model: Sensor data + maintenance records → degradation curve modeling per asset class. Predictive failure probability at each future time point. Economic analysis: remaining useful life vs. current maintenance cost trend vs. replacement cost. Total Cost of Ownership Calculator: acquisition cost + cumulative maintenance cost + opportunity cost of downtime + disposal cost vs. new asset equivalent. Optimal replacement point: where TCO curve of aging asset intersects TCO of new asset. Depreciation Automation: GAAP/IFRS depreciation schedule generation: straight-line, MACRS, units-of-production, sum-of-digits methods per asset class. Section 179 and bonus depreciation optimization. Automatic fixed asset schedule in ERP-compatible format. Lease vs. Buy Optimization: for new asset requirements, models: buy outright, operating lease, finance lease, USOF (Utility as a Service) options with NPV comparison at configurable hurdle rates. Disposal Optimization: identifies assets approaching end of useful life for proactive disposal planning. Coordinates with secondary market pricing data for optimal disposal timing.

title: ContentDNA
fullTitle:
ContentDNA: AI Brand Voice Governance and Content Consistency
            Platform
description:
An AI content governance platform that learns a
            brand's voice from its approved content corpus, scores any new content against the brand voice standard,
            flags inconsistencies, and auto-corrects content to align with brand guidelines—ensuring every piece of
            content produced by a 100+ person marketing team or agency network maintains perfect brand consistency.

detailedDescription.problem: Inconsistent brand voice costs companies 23% of their brand value (Lucidpress). Enterprise brands with 50+ content producers and 10+ agency partners produce content with measurably inconsistent voice, tone, and messaging—directly undermining brand equity worth billions. Brand managers currently review content manually, approving only 30-40% of submitted content on first review; revision cycles cost $200-$500 per content piece in labor.
detailedDescription.solution: An AI content governance platform that learns a brand's voice from its approved content corpus, scores any new content against the brand voice standard, flags inconsistencies, and auto-corrects content to align with brand guidelines—ensuring every piece of content produced by a 100+ person marketing team or agency network maintains perfect brand consistency.
detailedDescription.architecture: Brand Voice Model Construction: Ingest brand's approved content corpus: website copy, approved ad copy, approved social posts, brand guidelines document. Extract brand voice dimensions from corpus using NLP: formality register (formal-casual spectrum), sentence structure patterns (short punchy vs. long flowing), vocabulary preferences and prohibitions, emotional tone (inspiring, helpful, authoritative, playful), brand-specific terminology and nomenclature. Build a Brand Voice Embedding Model: fine-tune a style transfer model (GPT-4o fine-tuned on brand corpus) that captures the brand's distinctive voice. Content Scoring: given any new content piece, score it against brand voice model on 8 dimensions: register, tone, vocabulary compliance, terminology accuracy, message alignment, personality markers, sentence structure, length patterns. Overall brand voice compliance score (0-100%) with dimension-level breakdown. Automatic Correction Suggestions: for below-threshold content, generate specific edit suggestions per paragraph. Style transfer: provide brand-voice-aligned rewrite of flagged sections while preserving core message. Governance Workflow: Plug-in for Google Docs, Microsoft Word, and web editor. Real-time brand compliance score shown while writing. Brand manager approval queue: only content above threshold auto-approves; below-threshold requires review. Analytics dashboard: compliance trend over time, most common violations, team/agency performance comparison.

title: RegBot
fullTitle:
RegBot: Automated Regulatory Change Monitoring and Impact
            Assessment Engine
description:
A regulatory intelligence platform that
            continuously monitors 500+ regulatory sources across 50+ jurisdictions, uses NLP to classify new rules by
            affected business function and product, assesses operational impact on the subscribing company,
            automatically updates the company's regulatory inventory, and generates implementation
            checklists—compressing 4-week regulatory change assessment cycles to same-day notification.

detailedDescription.problem: Global regulatory change volume increased 500% between 2008 and 2024; financial institutions receive 250+ regulatory updates weekly. Compliance teams spend 40-50% of their time tracking regulatory changes—at $100K-$300K per compliance analyst. Regulatory action lag (companies implementing rules after effective date) generates $15B+ in annual fines globally. Mid-market companies lack the compliance staff to monitor the full regulatory landscape.
detailedDescription.solution: A regulatory intelligence platform that continuously monitors 500+ regulatory sources across 50+ jurisdictions, uses NLP to classify new rules by affected business function and product, assesses operational impact on the subscribing company, automatically updates the company's regulatory inventory, and generates implementation checklists—compressing 4-week regulatory change assessment cycles to same-day notification.
detailedDescription.architecture: Regulatory Feed Monitoring: 500+ regulatory sources across 50 jurisdictions: US federal agencies (Fed Register, CFPB, OCC, SEC, CFTC, FTC, DOL), state regulators (50 banking departments, insurance commissioners), EU/UK regulators (EBA, ESMA, FCA, PRA), international (BIS, IOSCO, FSB, FATF). NLP Classification Pipeline: document type classification (proposed rule, final rule, guidance, FAQ, enforcement action, exam manual update). Topic classification: which business functions/products are affected (lending, deposits, payments, AML, data privacy, consumer disclosure). Jurisdiction and effective date extraction. Quantify compliance burden: estimated implementation hours by type. Impact Assessment: for each new rule, company-specific impact assessment: is your company in scope (by entity type, product, geography)? Which internal policies are affected? Which system changes are required? Which third-party vendors need to update? generates: gap analysis against current compliance state, estimated remediation effort, implementation timeline recommendation, and cost estimate. Implementation Management: Checklist generation: task list with owner assignment, due dates keyed to effective date, approval workflow. Integration with task management (JIRA, ServiceNow) for automatic ticket creation. Progress tracking: % completion toward effective date. Regulatory inventory management: continuously updated register of all applicable regulations with compliance status.

title: HeatMap Pro
fullTitle:
HeatMap Pro: Real Estate Investment Opportunity Scoring and
            Market Intelligence
description:
A real estate investment intelligence platform that
            aggregates 200+ market signals (demographic trends, employment data, school scores, crime, transit access,
            permit activity, commercial development, retail opening/closing) to generate forward-looking neighborhood
            opportunity scores and identify undervalued markets 12-24 months before mainstream investor
            recognition—giving early-mover advantage to professional investors.

detailedDescription.problem: Real estate investment success depends on market timing and selection; professional investors spend $50,000-$500,000 per investment on market analysis. Most investment decisions are based on backward-looking metrics (last 12 months appreciation) rather than forward-looking indicators (what's improving). Identifying emerging neighborhoods before price appreciation occurs is worth 30-100% additional return—worth millions on a $5M investment.
detailedDescription.solution: A real estate investment intelligence platform that aggregates 200+ market signals (demographic trends, employment data, school scores, crime, transit access, permit activity, commercial development, retail opening/closing) to generate forward-looking neighborhood opportunity scores and identify undervalued markets 12-24 months before mainstream investor recognition—giving early-mover advantage to professional investors.
detailedDescription.architecture: Data Aggregation Layer: 200+ signals per census tract (neighborhood level): Demographics: Census ACS data, consumer credit score trends, income growth rate, age distribution change. Employment: LinkedIn job posting density by industry, major employer announcements, unemployment trends. School quality: GreatSchools scores, test score trend. Crime: FBI UCR crime statistics, trend direction. Transit: new transit line announcements, walkscore/transitscore trends. Development activity: building permit issuance rate by type (residential, commercial, mixed-use), permit value trends. Retail intelligence: new business license filings, retail opening vs. closing rate, QSR vs. upscale restaurant ratio change (leading gentrification indicator). Physical condition: satellite imagery analysis for building condition scoring, vacancy rate estimation. Opportunity Score Model: Gradient boosting model trained on historical data: which neighborhoods showed 30%+ appreciation in next 24 months? feature importance analysis identifies leading indicators. Output: Opportunity Score (0-100) per neighborhood with confidence interval and top-5 contributing factors. Investment Analysis Tools: Property-level cap rate estimation from Zillow/Attom rental and sale data. Market comparable analysis: auto-generate rent/sale comps within 0.5-mile radius. Rental demand projections: nearby employer growth → workforce housing demand estimate. Portfolio screening: filter all markets meeting configurable investment criteria. Generates: investment thesis document for each identified opportunity with all supporting data.

title: TradeAI
fullTitle:
TradeAI: Automated Import/Export Customs Classification and
            Compliance Engine
description:
An AI customs compliance platform that
            automatically classifies imported/exported goods using the Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS), applies correct
            duty rates, screens against denied party lists, checks export control classifications (ECCN), generates
            compliant commercial invoices and CBP entry summaries, and monitors for regulatory changes—eliminating
            customs broker fees ($2,000-$15,000 per shipment) and penalty risk for routine imports/exports.

detailedDescription.problem: US customs penalties for misclassification average $10,000-$20,000 per violation; companies face millions in retroactive duty assessments for systematic misclassification. HTS has 17,000+ 10-digit tariff codes; classifying complex goods (electronics with multiple functions, assemblies with multiple materials) requires specialist brokers charging $2,000-$15,000 per entry. Mid-market importers spend 15-20% of their customs operations budget on broker fees for routine classification work.
detailedDescription.solution: An AI customs compliance platform that automatically classifies imported/exported goods using the Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS), applies correct duty rates, screens against denied party lists, checks export control classifications (ECCN), generates compliant commercial invoices and CBP entry summaries, and monitors for regulatory changes—eliminating customs broker fees ($2,000-$15,000 per shipment) and penalty risk for routine imports/exports.
detailedDescription.architecture: HTS Classification Engine: Hierarchical text classification model: product description → HTS code. Training data: 5M+ cleared entry summaries with HTS codes from CBP ACE database (public records). Features: product description NLP (BERT-based), product category, material composition, country of origin, intended use. Multi-label output for ambiguous classifications with confidence scores. Classification reasoning: explains why each HTS code was selected with the specific characteristics that determine classification (material > 50% wool = wool category). Secondary Screens: Denied Party Screening: checks all parties (seller, buyer, freight forwarder, ultimate consignee) against consolidated denied party list (BIS Denied Persons, OFAC SDN, State Department Debarred). Real-time API + nightly database sync. Export Control: ECCN (Export Control Classification Number) determination for technology and controlled goods. EAR99 vs. controlled determination. License requirement check per destination country. Country of origin determination: preferential tariff eligibility analysis (USMCA, etc.). Documentation Generation: CBP Form 7501 (Entry Summary) auto-population. USMCA Certificate of Origin generation and validation. Commercial invoice and packing list in CBP-required format. ACH duty payment authorization. AES (Automated Export System) filing for export shipments. Duty Optimization: first sale valuation analysis. Foreign Trade Zone eligibility assessment. Duty drawback identification for re-exported goods.

title: ProbeNet
fullTitle:
ProbeNet: Automated Network Penetration Testing and
            Vulnerability Exploitation Report
description:
An automated penetration testing platform that
            conducts authorized, safe network and web application security assessments: discovering assets, identifying
            vulnerabilities, validating exploitation paths, measuring blast radius, and generating executive-level risk
            reports—delivering the output of a 2-week $20,000 penetration test in 4 hours at $500 for organizations that
            can't afford quarterly manual pentests.

detailedDescription.problem: 95% of mid-market companies conduct penetration testing less than twice per year, primarily due to cost ($15,000-$50,000 per engagement) and scheduling friction. Yet threat landscape changes faster than annual testing cycles. 43% of all cyberattacks target small businesses; average breach cost for SMBs is $200,000. Continuous automated penetration testing could catch vulnerabilities between manual assessments—at a fraction of the cost.
detailedDescription.solution: An automated penetration testing platform that conducts authorized, safe network and web application security assessments: discovering assets, identifying vulnerabilities, validating exploitation paths, measuring blast radius, and generating executive-level risk reports—delivering the output of a 2-week $20,000 penetration test in 4 hours at $500 for organizations that can't afford quarterly manual pentests.
detailedDescription.architecture: Reconnaissance and Asset Discovery: Passive reconnaissance: Shodan/Censys API scan of target IP ranges, DNS enumeration (subfinder, amass), certificate transparency log mining. Active scanning: nmap port/service fingerprinting, web crawler for application discovery. Asset inventory: discovered hosts, services, versions, technologies, surface area calculation. Vulnerability Identification: OpenVAS/Nessus API integration for CVE-based vulnerability scanning. Web application: OWASP ZAP automated scanner for OWASP Top 10 (SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, IDOR, broken auth, etc.). Custom checks: configuration issues (default credentials, exposed admin panels, debug modes). Version fingerprinting: correlate discovered versions against NVD CVE database for known vulnerabilities. Exploitation Validation (Safe Mode): For identified vulnerabilities, validates exploitability without causing damage: SQL injection: confirm blind injection exists via time-based detection without extracting data. Authentication bypass: test for authentication weaknesses without gaining actual unauthorized access. SSRF: confirm server-side request capability without reaching internal systems. This proves exploitability without causing harm—a key differentiator from pure scanning tools. Attack Path Analysis: Graph-based attack path modeling: which vulnerabilities, if chained, lead to critical systems. Business impact mapping: categorize each finding by potential impact (data exfiltration, ransomware pivot, lateral movement). CVSS + business context = risk-adjusted severity. Report Generation: Executive summary: business risk narrative, overall security posture score. Technical findings: per-vulnerability: evidence, CVSS score, exploitation path, business impact, remediation steps with code snippets. Remediation prioritization: ranked by risk-adjusted severity and remediation effort.

title: SpeakEasy
fullTitle:
SpeakEasy: AI Accent Neutralization and Pronunciation Coaching
            Platform for BPO
description:
An AI speech coaching and real-time accent
            assistance platform for BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) call centers that provides pronunciation
            guidance, offers optional real-time voice enhancement that reduces accent-related communication barriers,
            measures intelligibility scores, and tracks improvement over time—reducing call handle time by 15-20% and
            customer satisfaction scores by 20-30 points.

detailedDescription.problem: The global BPO industry employs 3.5M+ customer service agents, primarily in India, Philippines, and Eastern Europe serving US/UK customers. Accent-related communication misunderstandings extend average call handle time by 15-20%, reducing center profitability. BPO companies spend $500-$2,000 per agent annually on accent training with limited measurable improvement. Customer satisfaction (CSAT) scores are 20-30 points lower for heavily accented agents, directly affecting client contract renewals.
detailedDescription.solution: An AI speech coaching and real-time accent assistance platform for BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) call centers that provides pronunciation guidance, offers optional real-time voice enhancement that reduces accent-related communication barriers, measures intelligibility scores, and tracks improvement over time—reducing call handle time by 15-20% and customer satisfaction scores by 20-30 points.
detailedDescription.architecture: Pronunciation Assessment: Real-time phoneme-level analysis using Kaldi + custom pronunciation assessment model. Compares agent pronunciation against native speaker reference. Identifies: individual problematic phonemes (th vs. d, w vs. v, short vs. long vowels), word stress pattern errors, speech rate and rhythm issues, intonation pattern mismatches. Per-phoneme accuracy score with spectrogram visualization. Coaching Content Generation: For each identified pronunciation weakness, generates: (1) target sound articulation guide with IPA description and video lip/tongue position, (2) minimal pair exercises targeting the specific phoneme, (3) word lists with that phoneme in different positions. Spaced repetition scheduling for pronunciation drills based on BKT mastery tracking. Real-Time Voice Enhancement Mode (Optional): Real-time accent modification pipeline using voice conversion neural network (trained on native speaker voice pairs). Reduces accent markers while preserving speaker identity. Agent controls degree of enhancement. Latency: <50ms to fit voice call workflow. Privacy: enhancement happens locally, no audio sent externally. Call Analytics Integration: Integrates with Genesys/Avaya/Five9 call recording. Post-call intelligibility scoring per call. Agent improvement dashboard: pronunciation score trend, handle time correlation, CSAT correlation. Manager view: team skill gap identification, targeted coaching recommendations.

title: DataMesh
fullTitle:
DataMesh: Automated Data Quality Management and Lineage
            Tracking Platform
description:
A data observability platform that deploys
            lightweight probes across an organization's data pipelines to continuously measure data quality
            (completeness, accuracy, consistency, timeliness, uniqueness), automatically infers data quality rules from
            historical patterns, maps complete data lineage from source to dashboard, and alerts data engineers to
            quality incidents before they corrupt downstream analytics or ML models.

detailedDescription.problem: Bad data costs US companies $3.1T annually (IBM). 62% of executives don't fully trust their data; 84% of data scientists spend 60-80% of their time cleaning data rather than analyzing it. When a critical dashboard shows wrong numbers, finding the root cause in a complex pipeline with 500+ tables and 1,000+ transformations takes data engineers 4-24 hours. Data quality incidents reaching production cost $1M-$5M per incident in decision-making errors.
detailedDescription.solution: A data observability platform that deploys lightweight probes across an organization's data pipelines to continuously measure data quality (completeness, accuracy, consistency, timeliness, uniqueness), automatically infers data quality rules from historical patterns, maps complete data lineage from source to dashboard, and alerts data engineers to quality incidents before they corrupt downstream analytics or ML models.
detailedDescription.architecture: Data Profiling and Quality Measurement: SQL-level probes deployed in Spark, dbt, Airflow, and data warehouse environments (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks). Per-table, per-column quality metrics computed continuously: completeness (null rate), uniqueness (duplicate rate), validity (format compliance, range checks), freshness (time since last update), referential integrity (FK violation rate). Statistical baseline learning: tracks metric distributions over time, automatically defines expected ranges. Anomaly detection: statistical process control (SPC) charts flag deviations from baseline—no manual threshold configuration required. Data Lineage Tracking: Automatic lineage graph construction by: SQL parsing (extract source → target table relationships from transformation SQL), dbt manifest parsing (full dbt project lineage), Spark execution plan parsing, Airflow DAG structure. Stores: complete column-level lineage (which source column feeds which destination column through which transformations). Impact analysis: "if table X has a quality issue, which downstream dashboards and ML models are affected?" Data Contracts: Define expected schema, quality thresholds, and SLAs per table. Automated contract violation alerts. Contract version control: track schema evolution over time. Incident Resolution: for each quality incident: identify root cause pipeline step from lineage graph, estimate impact scope (downstream consumers), generate data quality incident report with: affected tables, affected consumers, estimated rows impacted, root cause hypothesis. Integration with dbt, Airflow, Informatica, Fivetran, Databricks.

title: PharmacoVigilance AI
fullTitle:
PharmacoVigilance AI: Drug Adverse Event Signal Detection and
            FDA Reporting Platform
description:
An AI pharmacovigilance platform for pharmaceutical
            companies that monitors adverse event reports from multiple sources (FDA FAERS, EHR case reports, social
            media, published literature, call center cases) to detect novel drug safety signals earlier than traditional
            methods, automatically generates MedDRA-coded case narratives, assesses signal strength using proportional
            reporting ratios and Bayesian methods, and auto-prepares FDA Individual Case Safety Reports (ICSRs) and
            Periodic Safety Update Reports (PSURs).

detailedDescription.problem: Pharmaceutical companies spend $1-$3B per drug in post-market pharmacovigilance. Missing a drug safety signal costs $5-$25B in product liability (Vioxx: $4.85B). Regulatory agencies mandate MedWatch, EudraVigilance, and VigiBase reporting within 7-15 days; manual case processing teams take 8-24 hours per case. A top-20 pharma company receives 500,000+ adverse event cases annually—requiring 500-1,500 pharmacovigilance staff.
detailedDescription.solution: An AI pharmacovigilance platform for pharmaceutical companies that monitors adverse event reports from multiple sources (FDA FAERS, EHR case reports, social media, published literature, call center cases) to detect novel drug safety signals earlier than traditional methods, automatically generates MedDRA-coded case narratives, assesses signal strength using proportional reporting ratios and Bayesian methods, and auto-prepares FDA Individual Case Safety Reports (ICSRs) and Periodic Safety Update Reports (PSURs).
detailedDescription.architecture: Adverse Event Case Ingestion: FDA FAERS database (continuous download via openFDA API). MedWatch online form processing. E2B XML standard case import for EHR-sourced cases. Social media adverse event mining: NLP model detecting drug adverse events in Twitter, Reddit, health forums (CADEC model). Published literature monitoring: PubMed article NLP for case reports in scientific literature. Call center case NLP: speech-to-text + adverse event extraction from call recordings. Case Processing Automation: MedDRA coding: BioBERT fine-tuned on MedDRA hierarchy for adverse event term coding (LLT → PT → HLT → HLGT → SOC coding). Seriousness assessment: rule engine applying FDA seriousness criteria (fatal, life-threatening, hospitalization, disability). Causality assessment: WHO-UMC algorithm implementation for drug-event causality scoring. ICSR generation: E2B(R3) XML generation for regulatory submission. Signal Detection: Disproportionality analysis using ROR (Reporting Odds Ratio), PRR (Proportional Reporting Ratio), IC (Information Component). Bayesian analysis: GPS (Gamma-Poisson Shrinker) and BCPNN (Bayesian Confidence Propagation Neural Network) for robust signal detection. Novel signal alert: when a drug-adverse event combination exceeds signal detection threshold and is not in current product label. Regulatory Reporting: PSUR (Periodic Safety Update Report) auto-drafting from aggregate adverse event data. Aggregate Line Listing generation. Agency submission package preparation for FDA, EMA, PMDA.

title: TaxCraft
fullTitle:
TaxCraft: AI Small Business Tax Optimization and Automated
            Filing Platform
description:
An AI tax platform for US small businesses
            (S-Corps, LLCs, sole proprietors) that integrates with accounting systems to continuously identify
            tax-saving opportunities throughout the year, optimizes entity structure, maximizes deductions, handles
            quarterly estimated taxes, and generates complete tax returns—replacing $2,000-$10,000 annual CPA fees with
            a $100/month AI tax advisor that proactively saves businesses 15-30% more in taxes.

detailedDescription.problem: 65M US small businesses pay an average of $5,000-$15,000 annually in unnecessary taxes due to missed deductions and suboptimal entity structure. CPAs charge $2,000-$10,000 for small business tax prep and are reactive: they prepare returns after the year ends, missing opportunities that only exist during the year. Average small business owner overpays by $8,000-$25,000 annually in taxes that proper planning would have avoided.
detailedDescription.solution: An AI tax platform for US small businesses (S-Corps, LLCs, sole proprietors) that integrates with accounting systems to continuously identify tax-saving opportunities throughout the year, optimizes entity structure, maximizes deductions, handles quarterly estimated taxes, and generates complete tax returns—replacing $2,000-$10,000 annual CPA fees with a $100/month AI tax advisor that proactively saves businesses 15-30% more in taxes.
detailedDescription.architecture: Accounting Integration: QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks, Wave real-time API integration. Transaction categorization using ML: merchant name + amount + memo → IRS deductible category. Receipt OCR for expense verification (LayoutLMv3 extraction). Bank transaction import for unlinked expense capture. Year-Round Tax Optimization: Deduction maximization scanning: continuously review books for: home office deduction (room calculation), vehicle mileage tracking, retirement contribution optimization (SEP-IRA, Solo 401k timing), QBI (Qualified Business Income) 20% deduction eligibility, Section 179 equipment expensing, R&D tax credit eligibility, health insurance premium deduction. Entity structure analysis: S-Corp vs. LLC vs. sole proprietor optimal structure based on net income level (S-Corp election break-even typically ~$40K-$50K net). Reasonable salary determination for S-Corp owners. Quarterly Estimated Tax: Quarterly estimated tax calculation based on YTD income. Safe harbor calculation to avoid underpayment penalties. Automatic payment initiation via EFTPS API. State estimated tax calculation for all applicable states. Tax Return Preparation: Form 1120S (S-Corp), 1065 (Partnership), Schedule C (Sole Proprietor) complete preparation. K-1 generation for S-Corps/partnerships. State returns for all applicable states. IRS e-file integration via TaxAct/TurboTax Business API or direct IRS MeF (Modernized e-File) system. Proactive Tax Advice: Monthly tax advisor report: YTD estimated tax liability, top 5 optimization opportunities, action items before year end.

title: NarratorAI
fullTitle:
NarratorAI: Automated Data Storytelling and Executive Dashboard
            Narration Platform
description:
An AI analytics narration platform that connects to
            any BI tool or data warehouse, analyzes dashboards and reports for significant changes, trends, and
            anomalies, then auto-generates executive-ready narrative summaries—the 'so what' story behind the
            numbers—delivered as natural language briefings, email digests, and slide commentary, replacing 4-8 hours
            per week of analyst report writing.

detailedDescription.problem: Business intelligence creates data but not insights. A weekly business review dashboard has 50+ charts; deriving the story of what happened and why requires an analyst spending 4-8 hours translating charts into coherent narrative. 75% of BI adoption failures are attributed to inability to interpret data, not lack of data. Executives want 'what does this mean?' not another dashboard to decode.
detailedDescription.solution: An AI analytics narration platform that connects to any BI tool or data warehouse, analyzes dashboards and reports for significant changes, trends, and anomalies, then auto-generates executive-ready narrative summaries—the 'so what' story behind the numbers—delivered as natural language briefings, email digests, and slide commentary, replacing 4-8 hours per week of analyst report writing.
detailedDescription.architecture: Data Source Integration: Native connectors for Tableau, Looker, Power BI, Metabase via API/embedding. Direct data warehouse connection: Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks. REST API for custom data sources. Analytical Intelligence Engine: Time-series analysis per metric: trend detection (slope, acceleration), seasonality-adjusted change detection, outlier identification. Comparative analysis: vs. prior period, vs. target, vs. benchmark. Correlation detection: which metrics are moving together. Contribution analysis: dimension decomposition to explain aggregate change (which customer segment, region, product drove the revenue change). Root cause hypothesis: "Revenue is down 12% MoM; the primary driver appears to be conversion rate decline in the mobile channel, specifically for first-time visitors." Narrative Generation: GPT-4o with business narrative prompt templates. Generates tone-matched narratives per audience: executive summary (2 paragraphs, business language), operational briefing (5-7 paragraphs with supporting data), deep dive (full analysis with methodology). Data storytelling principles applied: lead with the most important insight, quantify everything ("$2.3M impact"), provide context ("highest since Q2 2022"). Delivery Channels: Weekly automated email digest: automatically generated, delivered Monday 7 AM before business review. Slack briefing: daily key metric summary. PowerPoint commentary auto-population: slide-by-slide narrative generated from chart data. Natural language Q&A: "Why did churn increase in November?" → retrieves relevant data, generates explanatory narrative.

title: ArchetypeOS
fullTitle:
ArchetypeOS: AI-Powered No-Code Business Application Builder
            with LLM Backend
description:
A no-code application builder where users describe
            business applications in natural language, and the platform generates complete full-stack applications
            (database schema, backend APIs, frontend UI, business logic, integrations) that are
            production-deployable—targeting the 80% of enterprise software needs that are custom internal tools which
            cost $200K-$2M each to build traditionally, delivering them in hours at $500/month.

detailedDescription.problem: Enterprise IT backlogs average 14 months; business teams wait 1-3 years for custom internal tools. Shadow IT (employees using unauthorized tools) costs enterprises $5B+ annually in security and compliance exposure. A custom internal CRUD application (procurement tracker, vendor management tool, employee onboarding checklist) costs $50,000-$200,000 in development time for something that should take days. Low-code platforms (Retool, Appsmith) require technical users; AI generation closes this gap.
detailedDescription.solution: A no-code application builder where users describe business applications in natural language, and the platform generates complete full-stack applications (database schema, backend APIs, frontend UI, business logic, integrations) that are production-deployable—targeting the 80% of enterprise software needs that are custom internal tools which cost $200K-$2M each to build traditionally, delivering them in hours at $500/month.
detailedDescription.architecture: Application Generation Pipeline: Input: natural language description of desired application. Requirements extraction: GPT-4o structured output extracts: entities (data models), operations (CRUD + business logic), user roles, integrations required, UI preferences. Database Schema Generation: PostgreSQL schema from extracted entities with appropriate relationships, constraints, indexes. Database migration files generated with Alembic. Schema validation against normalization and performance requirements. Backend API Generation: FastAPI application generated from schema + operations. All CRUD endpoints. Business logic endpoints from natural language description. Authentication (JWT), authorization (RBAC), input validation generated automatically. OpenAPI spec auto-generated. Test suite generated: pytest with 100% endpoint coverage. Frontend Generation: React + TailwindCSS application generated from UI requirements. Component library: forms, tables, charts, navigation generated from data model. Role-based UI: different views for different user roles. Mobile-responsive by default. Integration Connectors: 100+ pre-built connectors: Slack, Salesforce, Google Sheets, QuickBooks, Stripe, Twilio, SendGrid. Natural language integration description: "When a new vendor is approved, send a Slack notification to #procurement" → generates correct webhook/API call code. Deployment: One-click Docker containerization. Deploy to: Railway, Render, AWS, GCP, Azure. Custom domain configuration. Environment management: dev/staging/prod. Post-Generation Refinement: Natural language modification: "Add a dashboard showing monthly spend by vendor" → modifies only relevant components. Maintain change history with rollback. Export full source code: developers can take ownership and extend beyond the platform.
